  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

### Reply lesson comment

- **Method:** `POST`
- **Path:** `/course/lesson-comments/{commentId}/reply`
- **Tags:** Lesson

* authenticated:

#### Parameters

##### `commentId` required

- **In:** `path`

Unique identifier of the post comment

`string`, format: `uuid`

#### Request Body

##### Content-Type: application/json

- **`content` (required)**

  `string`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "content": "This explanation of polymorphism is very clear."
}
```

#### Responses

##### Status: 201 Lesson comment reply created

##### Status: 400 Bad Request Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 401 Unauthorized Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

**Example:**

```json
{}
```

##### Status: 403 Forbidden Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 404 Not Found Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

### Move section

- **Method:** `POST`
- **Path:** `/course/courses/{courseId}/sections/{sectionId}/move`
- **Tags:** Section

* authenticated:

  - instructor
  - admin

#### Parameters

##### `courseId` required

- **In:** `path`

Unique identifier of the course

`string`, format: `uuid`

##### `sectionId` required

- **In:** `path`

`string`, format: `uuid`

#### Request Body

##### Content-Type: application/json

- **`order` (required)**

  `integer` — New order of the section within the course (0-based index)

**Example:**

```json
{
  "order": 1
}
```

#### Responses

##### Status: 200 Section moved successfully

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`data`**

  `object`

  - **`structure`**

    `array` — Resulting course structure after moving the section, including all sections and their lessons

    **Items:**

    - **`lessonIds`**

      `array`

      **Items:**

      `string`, format: `uuid`

    - **`sectionId`**

      `string`, format: `uuid`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "data": {
    "structure": [
      {
        "sectionId": "0de4f8f2-3440-4e29-9b88-9cfbbf4476fc",
        "lessonIds": [
          ""
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

##### Status: 400 Bad Request Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 401 Unauthorized Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

**Example:**

```json
{}
```

##### Status: 403 Forbidden Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 404 Not Found Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 500 Internal Server Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

### Delete section

- **Method:** `DELETE`
- **Path:** `/course/courses/{courseId}/sections/{sectionId}`
- **Tags:** Section

* authenticated:

  - instructor
  - admin

#### Parameters

##### `courseId` required

- **In:** `path`

Unique identifier of the course

`string`, format: `uuid`

##### `sectionId` required

- **In:** `path`

`string`, format: `uuid`

#### Responses

##### Status: 204 Section successfully deleted

##### Status: 400 Bad Request Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 401 Unauthorized Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

**Example:**

```json
{}
```

##### Status: 403 Forbidden Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 404 Not Found Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 500 Internal Server Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

### Update section

- **Method:** `PATCH`
- **Path:** `/course/courses/{courseId}/sections/{sectionId}`
- **Tags:** Section

* authenticated:

  - instructor
  - admin

#### Parameters

##### `courseId` required

- **In:** `path`

Unique identifier of the course

`string`, format: `uuid`

##### `sectionId` required

- **In:** `path`

`string`, format: `uuid`

#### Request Body

##### Content-Type: application/json

- **`title` (required)**

  `string`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "title": "OOP Fundamentals"
}
```

#### Responses

##### Status: 200 Section title successfully updated

##### Status: 400 Bad Request Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

###### Content-Type: application/json

**Example:**

```json
{}
```

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 404 Not Found Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

### Create section

- **Method:** `POST`
- **Path:** `/course/courses/{courseId}/sections`
- **Tags:** Section

* authenticated:

  - instructor
  - admin

#### Parameters

##### `courseId` required

- **In:** `path`

Unique identifier of the course

`string`, format: `uuid`

#### Request Body

##### Content-Type: application/json

- **`courseId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

- **`title` (required)**

  `string`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "courseId": "123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000",
  "title": "OOP Fundamentals"
}
```

#### Responses

##### Status: 201 Section created

##### Status: 400 Bad Request Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 401 Unauthorized Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

**Example:**

```json
{}
```

##### Status: 403 Forbidden Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 404 Not Found Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 500 Internal Server Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

### Get lesson comments

- **Method:** `GET`
- **Path:** `/course/courses/{courseId}/sections/{sectionId}/lessons/{lessonId}/comments`
- **Tags:** Lesson

* authenticated

#### Parameters

##### `courseId` required

- **In:** `path`

Unique identifier of the course

`string`, format: `uuid`

##### `sectionId` required

- **In:** `path`

`string`, format: `uuid`

##### `lessonId` required

- **In:** `path`

`string`, format: `uuid`

#### Responses

##### Status: 200 Top-level comments for the lesson

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`data` (required)**

  `array`

  **Items:**

  - **`content` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`createdAt` (required)**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`id` (required)**

    `string`, format: `uuid`

  - **`lessonId` (required)**

    `string`, format: `uuid`

  - **`userId` (required)**

    `string`, format: `number` — User ID from Authentik (need to change subject mode to User's ID instead of hashed)

  - **`parentCommentId`**

    `string | null`, format: `uuid`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "1c948f26-c6db-4f20-b6ac-2d10164fb8c0",
      "userId": null,
      "lessonId": null,
      "content": "This explanation of polymorphism is very clear.",
      "createdAt": "2026-03-22T10:30:00Z",
      "parentCommentId": "8fd4f406-583d-4cd5-9c24-23c490a06711"
    }
  ]
}
```

##### Status: 401 Unauthorized Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

**Example:**

```json
{}
```

##### Status: 403 Forbidden Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 404 Not Found Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 500 Internal Server Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

- **Method:** `POST`
- **Path:** `/course/courses/{courseId}/sections/{sectionId}/lessons/{lessonId}/comments`
- **Tags:** Lesson

* authenticated:

#### Parameters

##### `courseId` required

- **In:** `path`

Unique identifier of the course

`string`, format: `uuid`

##### `sectionId` required

- **In:** `path`

`string`, format: `uuid`

##### `lessonId` required

- **In:** `path`

`string`, format: `uuid`

#### Request Body

##### Content-Type: application/json

- **`content` (required)**

  `string`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "content": "This explanation of polymorphism is very clear."
}
```

#### Responses

##### Status: 201 Lesson comment created

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json

  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",

}
```

**Example:**

```json

```

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

- **`message` (required)**

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

* authenticated:

#### Parameters

##### `courseId` required

- **In:** `path`

Unique identifier of the course

`string`, format: `uuid`

- **In:** `path`

`string`, format: `uuid`

- **In:** `path`

`string`, format: `uuid`

  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}

### Move lesson

- **Method:** `POST`
- **Path:** `/course/courses/{courseId}/sections/{sectionId}/lessons/{lessonId}/move`
- **Tags:** Lesson

* authenticated:

  - instructor
  - admin

#### Parameters

##### `courseId` required

- **In:** `path`

Unique identifier of the course

`string`, format: `uuid`

##### `sectionId` required

- **In:** `path`

`string`, format: `uuid`

##### `lessonId` required

- **In:** `path`

`string`, format: `uuid`

#### Request Body

##### Content-Type: application/json

- **`order` (required)**

  `integer`, format: `int` — The new 0-based position of the lesson within the target section.

- **`targetSectionId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid` — The ID of the section to move the lesson into. Use the current sectionId if only reordering.

**Example:**

```json
{
  "targetSectionId": "0de4f8f2-3440-4e29-9b88-9cfbbf4476fc",
  "order": 2
}
```

#### Responses

##### Status: 201 Lesson moved successfully

##### Status: 400 Bad Request Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 401 Unauthorized Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

**Example:**

```json
{}
```

##### Status: 403 Forbidden Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 404 Not Found Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 500 Internal Server Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

### Get lesson progress

- **Method:** `GET`
- **Path:** `/course/courses/{courseId}/sections/{sectionId}/lessons/{lessonId}/progress`
- **Tags:** Lesson

* authenticated:

#### Parameters

##### `courseId` required

- **In:** `path`

Unique identifier of the course

`string`, format: `uuid`

##### `sectionId` required

- **In:** `path`

`string`, format: `uuid`

##### `lessonId` required

- **In:** `path`

`string`, format: `uuid`

#### Request Body

##### Content-Type: application/json

- **`enrollmentId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "enrollmentId": "123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000"
}
```

#### Responses

##### Status: 200 Lesson progress

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`data` (required)**

  `object`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "data": null
}
```

##### Status: 400 Bad Request Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 401 Unauthorized Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

**Example:**

```json
{}
```

##### Status: 403 Forbidden Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 404 Not Found Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 500 Internal Server Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

### Edit test lesson

- **Method:** `PUT`
- **Path:** `/course/courses/{courseId}/sections/{sectionId}/lessons/{lessonId}/test`
- **Tags:** Lesson

* authenticated:

  - instructor
  - admin

#### Parameters

##### `courseId` required

- **In:** `path`

Unique identifier of the course

`string`, format: `uuid`

##### `sectionId` required

- **In:** `path`

`string`, format: `uuid`

##### `lessonId` required

- **In:** `path`

`string`, format: `uuid`

#### Request Body

##### Content-Type: application/json

**All of:**

- **`title` (required)**

  `string`

- **`id`**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

- **`originalLessonID`**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

* **`lessonType` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"test"`

* **`questions` (required)**

  `array`

  **Items:**

  - **`answers` (required)**

    `array`

    **Items:**

    - **`content` (required)**

      `string`

    - **`id` (required)**

      `string`, format: `uuid`

    - **`isCorrect` (required)**

      `boolean`

  - **`id` (required)**

    `string`, format: `uuid`

  - **`question` (required)**

    `string`

* **`questionType` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"multipleChoice", "singleChoice"`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "id": "2926aa3f-29ad-449b-9556-c44d4fc676a0",
  "title": "Introduction to Python",
  "originalLessonID": "2926aa3f-29ad-449b-9556-c44d4fc676a0",
  "lessonType": "test",
  "questionType": "singleChoice",
  "questions": [
    {
      "id": "af2fb7f2-cf11-40d4-8628-b28f7d40f933",
      "question": "Which principle of OOP enables exposing only essential behavior?",
      "answers": []
    }
  ]
}
```

#### Responses

##### Status: 204 Test lesson successfully updated

##### Status: 400 Bad Request Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 401 Unauthorized Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

**Example:**

```json
{}
```

##### Status: 403 Forbidden Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 404 Not Found Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 500 Internal Server Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

### Save video lesson progress

- **Method:** `PUT`
- **Path:** `/course/courses/{courseId}/sections/{sectionId}/lessons/{lessonId}/video-progress`
- **Tags:** Lesson

#### Parameters

##### `courseId` required

- **In:** `path`

Unique identifier of the course

`string`, format: `uuid`

##### `sectionId` required

- **In:** `path`

`string`, format: `uuid`

##### `lessonId` required

- **In:** `path`

`string`, format: `uuid`

#### Request Body

##### Content-Type: application/json

**All of:**

- **`id` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

- **`isCompleted` (required)**

  `boolean`

- **`lessonId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

- **`userId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `number` — User ID from Authentik (need to change subject mode to User's ID instead of hashed)

* **`lastViewedAt` (required)**

  `string`, format: `date-time`

* **`watchedSeconds` (required)**

  `number`, format: `float`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "id": "1e3a0a43-d6df-4f6d-a58d-60f0e5162f11",
  "userId": null,
  "lessonId": "1e3a0a43-d6df-4f6d-a58d-60f0e5162f11",
  "isCompleted": true,
  "watchedSeconds": 245.5,
  "lastViewedAt": "2024-06-01T12:34:56Z"
}
```

#### Responses

##### Status: 204 Video lesson progress saved

##### Status: 400 Bad Request Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 401 Unauthorized Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

**Example:**

```json
{}
```

##### Status: 403 Forbidden Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 404 Not Found Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 500 Internal Server Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

### Edit video lesson

- **Method:** `PATCH`
- **Path:** `/course/courses/{courseId}/sections/{sectionId}/lessons/{lessonId}/video`
- **Tags:** Lesson

* authenticated:

  - instructor
  - admin

#### Parameters

##### `courseId` required

- **In:** `path`

Unique identifier of the course

`string`, format: `uuid`

##### `sectionId` required

- **In:** `path`

`string`, format: `uuid`

##### `lessonId` required

- **In:** `path`

`string`, format: `uuid`

#### Request Body

##### Content-Type: application/json

- **`duration`**

  `integer`, format: `int64`

- **`title`**

  `string`

- **`videoKey`**

  `string`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "videoKey": "lessons/46f94d4d-41b5-4df6-bf8d-270fb9a49c97/87632fe7-27e5-445e-8ddf-b73557cb990d-introduction_to_python.mp4",
  "title": "Introduction to Python",
  "duration": 300
}
```

#### Responses

##### Status: 204 Video lesson successfully updated

##### Status: 400 Bad Request Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 401 Unauthorized Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

**Example:**

```json
{}
```

##### Status: 403 Forbidden Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 404 Not Found Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 500 Internal Server Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

### Get lesson detail

- **Method:** `GET`
- **Path:** `/course/courses/{courseId}/sections/{sectionId}/lessons/{lessonId}`
- **Tags:** Lesson

* authenticated:

#### Parameters

##### `courseId` required

- **In:** `path`

Unique identifier of the course

`string`, format: `uuid`

##### `sectionId` required

- **In:** `path`

`string`, format: `uuid`

##### `lessonId` required

- **In:** `path`

`string`, format: `uuid`

#### Responses

##### Status: 200 Lesson detail

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`data` (required)**

  `object`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "data": null
}
```

##### Status: 400 Bad Request Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 401 Unauthorized Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

**Example:**

```json
{}
```

##### Status: 403 Forbidden Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 404 Not Found Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 500 Internal Server Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

### Delete lesson

- **Method:** `DELETE`
- **Path:** `/course/courses/{courseId}/sections/{sectionId}/lessons/{lessonId}`
- **Tags:** Lesson

* authenticated:

  - instructor
  - admin

#### Parameters

##### `courseId` required

- **In:** `path`

Unique identifier of the course

`string`, format: `uuid`

##### `sectionId` required

- **In:** `path`

`string`, format: `uuid`

##### `lessonId` required

- **In:** `path`

`string`, format: `uuid`

#### Responses

##### Status: 204 Lesson successfully deleted

##### Status: 400 Bad Request Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 401 Unauthorized Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

**Example:**

```json
{}
```

##### Status: 403 Forbidden Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 404 Not Found Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 500 Internal Server Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

### Create lesson

- **Method:** `POST`
- **Path:** `/course/courses/{courseId}/sections/{sectionId}/lessons`
- **Tags:** Lesson

* authenticated:

  - instructor
  - admin

#### Parameters

##### `courseId` required

- **In:** `path`

Unique identifier of the course

`string`, format: `uuid`

##### `sectionId` required

- **In:** `path`

`string`, format: `uuid`

#### Request Body

##### Content-Type: application/json

**One of:**

**All of:**

- **`title` (required)**

  `string`

- **`id`**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

- **`originalLessonID`**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

* **`duration` (required)**

  `integer`, format: `int64`

* **`lessonType` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"video"`

* **`videoKey` (required)**

  `string`

* **`videoUrl`**

  `string`, format: `uri`

**All of:**

- **`title` (required)**

  `string`

- **`id`**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

- **`originalLessonID`**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

* **`lessonType` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"test"`

* **`questions` (required)**

  `array`

  **Items:**

  - **`answers` (required)**

    `array`

    **Items:**

    - **`content` (required)**

      `string`

    - **`id` (required)**

      `string`, format: `uuid`

    - **`isCorrect` (required)**

      `boolean`

  - **`id` (required)**

    `string`, format: `uuid`

  - **`question` (required)**

    `string`

* **`questionType` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"multipleChoice", "singleChoice"`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "lessonType": "video",
  "videoKey": "lessons/46f94d4d-41b5-4df6-bf8d-270fb9a49c97/87632fe7-27e5-445e-8ddf-b73557cb990d-introduction_to_python.mp4",
  "videoUrl": "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ",
  "duration": 300
}
```

#### Responses

##### Status: 201 Lesson created

##### Status: 400 Bad Request Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 401 Unauthorized Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

**Example:**

```json
{}
```

##### Status: 403 Forbidden Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 500 Internal Server Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

### Checkout course

- **Method:** `POST`
- **Path:** `/billing/courses/{courseId}/checkout`
- **Tags:** Billing

* authenticated:

#### Parameters

##### `courseId` required

- **In:** `path`

Unique identifier of the course

`string`, format: `uuid`

#### Responses

##### Status: 201 Checkout successful, transaction created

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`paymentUrl` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uri`

- **`transactionId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "transactionId": "0f4f19b1-1602-4c12-ac1a-9ad5baf1e4dc",
  "paymentUrl": "https://api.egolia.com/billing/transactions/0f4f19b1-1602-4c12-ac1a-9ad5baf1e4dc"
}
```

##### Status: 400 Bad Request Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 401 Unauthorized Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

**Example:**

```json
{}
```

##### Status: 403 Forbidden Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 500 Internal Server Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

### Get platform revenue analytics

- **Method:** `GET`
- **Path:** `/billing/admin/analytics/revenue`
- **Tags:** Billing

#### Parameters

##### `from` required

- **In:** `query`

`string`, format: `date`

##### `to` required

- **In:** `query`

`string`, format: `date`

#### Responses

##### Status: 200 Revenue analytics

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`completedTransactions` (required)**

  `integer`

- **`failedTransactions` (required)**

  `integer`

- **`from` (required)**

  `string`, format: `date-time`

- **`to` (required)**

  `string`, format: `date-time`

- **`totalRevenue` (required)**

  `integer`, format: `int64`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "from": "2026-03-22T10:30:00Z",
  "to": "2026-03-22T10:30:00Z",
  "totalRevenue": 152000000,
  "completedTransactions": 421,
  "failedTransactions": 9
}
```

##### Status: 401 Unauthorized Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

**Example:**

```json
{}
```

##### Status: 403 Forbidden Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 500 Internal Server Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

### Get transactions

- **Method:** `GET`
- **Path:** `/billing/transactions`
- **Tags:** Billing

#### Parameters

##### `page`

- **In:** `query`

Page number for pagination

`integer`, default: `1`

##### `limit`

- **In:** `query`

Number of items per page

`integer`, default: `20`

##### `order`

- **In:** `query`

Sort order

`string`, possible values: `"asc", "desc"`, default: `"desc"`

##### `courseId`

- **In:** `query`

`string`, format: `uuid`

##### `learnerId`

- **In:** `query`

If requested by non admin, then it will be that user

`string`, format: `number` — User ID from Authentik (need to change subject mode to User's ID instead of hashed)

#### Responses

##### Status: 200 Learner billing history

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`data` (required)**

  `array`

  **Items:**

  - **`amount` (required)**

    `integer`, format: `int64`

  - **`courseId` (required)**

    `string`, format: `uuid`

  - **`createdAt` (required)**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`id` (required)**

    `string`, format: `uuid`

  - **`status` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"pending", "completed", "failed"` — Current status of a billing transaction

  - **`updatedAt` (required)**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`userId` (required)**

    `string`, format: `number` — User ID from Authentik (need to change subject mode to User's ID instead of hashed)

- **`pagination` (required)**

  `object`

  - **`hasNext` (required)**

    `boolean` — Whether there is a next page

  - **`hasPrev` (required)**

    `boolean` — Whether there is a previous page

  - **`limit` (required)**

    `integer` — Number of items per page

  - **`page` (required)**

    `integer` — Current page number

  - **`total` (required)**

    `integer` — Total number of items

  - **`totalPages` (required)**

    `integer` — Total number of pages

**Example:**

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "4c7c8f0a-4f6e-4da1-867d-38f1120f0e5d",
      "userId": null,
      "courseId": "0f4f19b1-1602-4c12-ac1a-9ad5baf1e4dc",
      "amount": 499000,
      "status": null,
      "createdAt": "2026-03-25T08:30:00Z",
      "updatedAt": "2026-03-25T08:30:00Z"
    }
  ],
  "pagination": {
    "page": 1,
    "limit": 20,
    "total": 100,
    "totalPages": 5,
    "hasNext": true,
    "hasPrev": false
  }
}
```

##### Status: 401 Unauthorized Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

**Example:**

```json
{}
```

##### Status: 500 Internal Server Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

### Search posts

- **Method:** `GET`
- **Path:** `/blog/posts`
- **Tags:** Post

#### Parameters

##### `q`

- **In:** `query`

Full-text keyword for post search

`string`

##### `tag`

- **In:** `query`

Filter posts by tag

`string`

##### `page`

- **In:** `query`

Page number for pagination

`integer`, default: `1`

##### `limit`

- **In:** `query`

Number of items per page

`integer`, default: `20`

##### `order`

- **In:** `query`

Sort order

`string`, possible values: `"asc", "desc"`, default: `"desc"`

#### Responses

##### Status: 200 Matched blog posts

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`data` (required)**

  `array`

  **Items:**

  - **`authorId` (required)**

    `string`, format: `number` — User ID from Authentik (need to change subject mode to User's ID instead of hashed)

  - **`commentCount` (required)**

    `integer`

  - **`content` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`createdAt` (required)**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`id` (required)**

    `string`, format: `uuid`

  - **`tags` (required)**

    `array`

    **Items:**

    `string`

  - **`title` (required)**

    `string`

- **`pagination` (required)**

  `object`

  - **`hasNext` (required)**

    `boolean` — Whether there is a next page

  - **`hasPrev` (required)**

    `boolean` — Whether there is a previous page

  - **`limit` (required)**

    `integer` — Number of items per page

  - **`page` (required)**

    `integer` — Current page number

  - **`total` (required)**

    `integer` — Total number of items

  - **`totalPages` (required)**

    `integer` — Total number of pages

**Example:**

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "74af02ce-4e69-4ca1-a721-c0e19c9937b8",
      "authorId": null,
      "title": "Cach toi toi uu hanh trinh hoc tap",
      "content": "Day la noi dung bai viet chia se kinh nghiem hoc tap tren Egolia.",
      "tags": [
        "learning",
        "productivity"
      ],
      "createdAt": "2026-03-25T08:00:00Z",
      "commentCount": 12
    }
  ],
  "pagination": {
    "page": 1,
    "limit": 20,
    "total": 100,
    "totalPages": 5,
    "hasNext": true,
    "hasPrev": false
  }
}
```

##### Status: 401 Unauthorized Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

**Example:**

```json
{}
```

##### Status: 500 Internal Server Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

### Create post

- **Method:** `POST`
- **Path:** `/blog/posts`
- **Tags:** Post

#### Request Body

##### Content-Type: application/json

- **`authorId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `number` — User ID from Authentik (need to change subject mode to User's ID instead of hashed)

- **`commentCount` (required)**

  `integer`

- **`content` (required)**

  `string`

- **`createdAt` (required)**

  `string`, format: `date-time`

- **`id` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

- **`tags` (required)**

  `array`

  **Items:**

  `string`

- **`title` (required)**

  `string`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "id": "74af02ce-4e69-4ca1-a721-c0e19c9937b8",
  "authorId": "100",
  "title": "Cach toi toi uu hanh trinh hoc tap",
  "content": "Day la noi dung bai viet chia se kinh nghiem hoc tap tren Egolia.",
  "tags": [
    "learning",
    "productivity"
  ],
  "createdAt": "2026-03-25T08:00:00Z",
  "commentCount": 12
}
```

#### Responses

##### Status: 201 Post created

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`authorId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `number` — User ID from Authentik (need to change subject mode to User's ID instead of hashed)

- **`commentCount` (required)**

  `integer`

- **`content` (required)**

  `string`

- **`createdAt` (required)**

  `string`, format: `date-time`

- **`id` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

- **`tags` (required)**

  `array`

  **Items:**

  `string`

- **`title` (required)**

  `string`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "id": "74af02ce-4e69-4ca1-a721-c0e19c9937b8",
  "authorId": "100",
  "title": "Cach toi toi uu hanh trinh hoc tap",
  "content": "Day la noi dung bai viet chia se kinh nghiem hoc tap tren Egolia.",
  "tags": [
    "learning",
    "productivity"
  ],
  "createdAt": "2026-03-25T08:00:00Z",
  "commentCount": 12
}
```

##### Status: 400 Bad Request Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 401 Unauthorized Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

**Example:**

```json
{}
```

##### Status: 500 Internal Server Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

### Get post detail

- **Method:** `GET`
- **Path:** `/blog/posts/{postId}`
- **Tags:** Post

#### Parameters

##### `postId` required

- **In:** `path`

Unique identifier of the blog post

`string`, format: `uuid`

#### Responses

##### Status: 200 Blog post detail

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`authorId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `number` — User ID from Authentik (need to change subject mode to User's ID instead of hashed)

- **`commentCount` (required)**

  `integer`

- **`content` (required)**

  `string`

- **`createdAt` (required)**

  `string`, format: `date-time`

- **`id` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

- **`tags` (required)**

  `array`

  **Items:**

  `string`

- **`title` (required)**

  `string`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "id": "74af02ce-4e69-4ca1-a721-c0e19c9937b8",
  "authorId": "100",
  "title": "Cach toi toi uu hanh trinh hoc tap",
  "content": "Day la noi dung bai viet chia se kinh nghiem hoc tap tren Egolia.",
  "tags": [
    "learning",
    "productivity"
  ],
  "createdAt": "2026-03-25T08:00:00Z",
  "commentCount": 12
}
```

##### Status: 401 Unauthorized Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

**Example:**

```json
{}
```

##### Status: 404 Not Found Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 500 Internal Server Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

### Update post

- **Method:** `PUT`
- **Path:** `/blog/posts/{postId}`
- **Tags:** Post

#### Parameters

##### `postId` required

- **In:** `path`

Unique identifier of the blog post

`string`, format: `uuid`

#### Request Body

##### Content-Type: application/json

- **`content` (required)**

  `string`

- **`tags` (required)**

  `array`

  **Items:**

  `string`

- **`title` (required)**

  `string`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "title": "Cach toi toi uu hanh trinh hoc tap",
  "content": "Day la noi dung bai viet chia se kinh nghiem hoc tap tren Egolia.",
  "tags": [
    "learning",
    "productivity"
  ]
}
```

#### Responses

##### Status: 200 Post updated

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`authorId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `number` — User ID from Authentik (need to change subject mode to User's ID instead of hashed)

- **`commentCount` (required)**

  `integer`

- **`content` (required)**

  `string`

- **`createdAt` (required)**

  `string`, format: `date-time`

- **`id` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

- **`tags` (required)**

  `array`

  **Items:**

  `string`

- **`title` (required)**

  `string`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "id": "74af02ce-4e69-4ca1-a721-c0e19c9937b8",
  "authorId": "100",
  "title": "Cach toi toi uu hanh trinh hoc tap",
  "content": "Day la noi dung bai viet chia se kinh nghiem hoc tap tren Egolia.",
  "tags": [
    "learning",
    "productivity"
  ],
  "createdAt": "2026-03-25T08:00:00Z",
  "commentCount": 12
}
```

##### Status: 400 Bad Request Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 401 Unauthorized Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

**Example:**

```json
{}
```

##### Status: 403 Forbidden Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 404 Not Found Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 500 Internal Server Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

- **Method:** `DELETE`
- **Path:** `/blog/posts/{postId}`
- **Tags:** Post

#### Parameters

##### `postId` required

- **In:** `path`

Unique identifier of the blog post

`string`, format: `uuid`

#### Responses

##### Status: 204 Post deleted successfully

##### Status: 401 Unauthorized Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

**Example:**

```json
{}
```

##### Status: 403 Forbidden Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 404 Not Found Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```
