###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

### Get post comments

- **Method:** `GET`
- **Path:** `/blog/posts/{postId}/comments`
- **Tags:** Comment

#### Parameters

##### `postId` required

- **In:** `path`

Unique identifier of the blog post

`string`, format: `uuid`

#### Responses

##### Status: 200 Top-level comments for the post

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`data` (required)**

  `array`

  **Items:**

  - **`authorId` (required)**

    `string`, format: `number` — User ID from Authentik (need to change subject mode to User's ID instead of hashed)

  - **`content` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`createdAt` (required)**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`id` (required)**

    `string`, format: `uuid`

  - **`parentCommentId` (required)**

    `string | null`, format: `uuid`

  - **`postId` (required)**

    `string`, format: `uuid`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "834897ce-45e7-43a5-92b2-4ec1f0dc3cd1",
      "postId": "74af02ce-4e69-4ca1-a721-c0e19c9937b8",
      "authorId": null,
      "content": "Bai viet nay rat huu ich.",
      "parentCommentId": null,
      "createdAt": "2026-03-25T09:00:00Z"
    }
  ]
}
```

##### Status: 401 Unauthorized Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

**Example:**

```json
{}
```

##### Status: 404 Not Found Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 500 Internal Server Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

### Comment on post

- **Method:** `POST`
- **Path:** `/blog/posts/{postId}/comments`
- **Tags:** Comment

#### Parameters

##### `postId` required

- **In:** `path`

Unique identifier of the blog post

`string`, format: `uuid`

#### Request Body

##### Content-Type: application/json

- **`authorId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `number` — User ID from Authentik (need to change subject mode to User's ID instead of hashed)

- **`content` (required)**

  `string`

- **`createdAt` (required)**

  `string`, format: `date-time`

- **`id` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

- **`parentCommentId` (required)**

  `string | null`, format: `uuid`

- **`postId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "id": "834897ce-45e7-43a5-92b2-4ec1f0dc3cd1",
  "postId": "74af02ce-4e69-4ca1-a721-c0e19c9937b8",
  "authorId": "100",
  "content": "Bai viet nay rat huu ich.",
  "parentCommentId": null,
  "createdAt": "2026-03-25T09:00:00Z"
}
```

#### Responses

##### Status: 201 Comment created

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`authorId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `number` — User ID from Authentik (need to change subject mode to User's ID instead of hashed)

- **`content` (required)**

  `string`

- **`createdAt` (required)**

  `string`, format: `date-time`

- **`id` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

- **`parentCommentId` (required)**

  `string | null`, format: `uuid`

- **`postId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "id": "834897ce-45e7-43a5-92b2-4ec1f0dc3cd1",
  "postId": "74af02ce-4e69-4ca1-a721-c0e19c9937b8",
  "authorId": "100",
  "content": "Bai viet nay rat huu ich.",
  "parentCommentId": null,
  "createdAt": "2026-03-25T09:00:00Z"
}
```

##### Status: 400 Bad Request Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 401 Unauthorized Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

**Example:**

```json
{}
```

##### Status: 404 Not Found Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 500 Internal Server Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

### Update comment

- **Method:** `PUT`
- **Path:** `/blog/comments/{commentId}`
- **Tags:** Comment

#### Parameters

##### `commentId` required

- **In:** `path`

Unique identifier of the post comment

`string`, format: `uuid`

#### Request Body

##### Content-Type: application/json

- **`authorId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `number` — User ID from Authentik (need to change subject mode to User's ID instead of hashed)

- **`content` (required)**

  `string`

- **`createdAt` (required)**

  `string`, format: `date-time`

- **`id` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

- **`parentCommentId` (required)**

  `string | null`, format: `uuid`

- **`postId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "id": "834897ce-45e7-43a5-92b2-4ec1f0dc3cd1",
  "postId": "74af02ce-4e69-4ca1-a721-c0e19c9937b8",
  "authorId": "100",
  "content": "Bai viet nay rat huu ich.",
  "parentCommentId": null,
  "createdAt": "2026-03-25T09:00:00Z"
}
```

#### Responses

##### Status: 200 Comment updated

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`authorId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `number` — User ID from Authentik (need to change subject mode to User's ID instead of hashed)

- **`content` (required)**

  `string`

- **`createdAt` (required)**

  `string`, format: `date-time`

- **`id` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

- **`parentCommentId` (required)**

  `string | null`, format: `uuid`

- **`postId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "id": "834897ce-45e7-43a5-92b2-4ec1f0dc3cd1",
  "postId": "74af02ce-4e69-4ca1-a721-c0e19c9937b8",
  "authorId": "100",
  "content": "Bai viet nay rat huu ich.",
  "parentCommentId": null,
  "createdAt": "2026-03-25T09:00:00Z"
}
```

##### Status: 400 Bad Request Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 401 Unauthorized Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

**Example:**

```json
{}
```

##### Status: 403 Forbidden Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 404 Not Found Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 500 Internal Server Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

### Delete comment

- **Method:** `DELETE`
- **Path:** `/blog/comments/{commentId}`
- **Tags:** Comment

#### Parameters

##### `commentId` required

- **In:** `path`

Unique identifier of the post comment

`string`, format: `uuid`

#### Responses

##### Status: 204 Comment deleted successfully

##### Status: 401 Unauthorized Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

**Example:**

```json
{}
```

##### Status: 403 Forbidden Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 404 Not Found Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 500 Internal Server Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

### Reply comment

- **Method:** `POST`
- **Path:** `/blog/comments/{commentId}/replies`
- **Tags:** Comment

#### Parameters

##### `commentId` required

- **In:** `path`

Unique identifier of the post comment

`string`, format: `uuid`

#### Request Body

##### Content-Type: application/json

- **`authorId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `number` — User ID from Authentik (need to change subject mode to User's ID instead of hashed)

- **`content` (required)**

  `string`

- **`createdAt` (required)**

  `string`, format: `date-time`

- **`id` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

- **`parentCommentId` (required)**

  `string | null`, format: `uuid`

- **`postId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "id": "834897ce-45e7-43a5-92b2-4ec1f0dc3cd1",
  "postId": "74af02ce-4e69-4ca1-a721-c0e19c9937b8",
  "authorId": "100",
  "content": "Bai viet nay rat huu ich.",
  "parentCommentId": null,
  "createdAt": "2026-03-25T09:00:00Z"
}
```

#### Responses

##### Status: 201 Reply created

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`authorId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `number` — User ID from Authentik (need to change subject mode to User's ID instead of hashed)

- **`content` (required)**

  `string`

- **`createdAt` (required)**

  `string`, format: `date-time`

- **`id` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

- **`parentCommentId` (required)**

  `string | null`, format: `uuid`

- **`postId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "id": "834897ce-45e7-43a5-92b2-4ec1f0dc3cd1",
  "postId": "74af02ce-4e69-4ca1-a721-c0e19c9937b8",
  "authorId": "100",
  "content": "Bai viet nay rat huu ich.",
  "parentCommentId": null,
  "createdAt": "2026-03-25T09:00:00Z"
}
```

##### Status: 400 Bad Request Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 401 Unauthorized Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

**Example:**

```json
{}
```

##### Status: 404 Not Found Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

##### Status: 500 Internal Server Error response

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

- **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

- **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

## Schemas

### course\_id

- **Type:**`string`

**Example:**

### course\_properties-id

- **Type:**`string`

User ID from Authentik (need to change subject mode to User's ID instead of hashed)

**Example:**

### course\_Certificate

- **Type:**`object`

* **`courseId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

* **`createdAt` (required)**

  `string`, format: `date-time`

* **`id` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

* **`userId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `number` — User ID from Authentik (need to change subject mode to User's ID instead of hashed)

**Example:**

```json
{
  "id": "f56b56cb-4dc9-4f84-b9d0-f20f73de2ffd",
  "courseId": "123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000",
  "userId": "100",
  "createdAt": "2026-05-01T07:30:00Z"
}
```

### course\_Error

- **Type:**`object`

* **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

* **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

* **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

### course\_Pagination

- **Type:**`object`

* **`hasNext` (required)**

  `boolean` — Whether there is a next page

* **`hasPrev` (required)**

  `boolean` — Whether there is a previous page

* **`limit` (required)**

  `integer` — Number of items per page

* **`page` (required)**

  `integer` — Current page number

* **`total` (required)**

  `integer` — Total number of items

* **`totalPages` (required)**

  `integer` — Total number of pages

**Example:**

```json
{
  "page": 1,
  "limit": 20,
  "total": 100,
  "totalPages": 5,
  "hasNext": true,
  "hasPrev": false
}
```

### course\_CourseStatus

- **Type:**`string`

**Example:**

### course\_Course

- **Type:**`object`

* **`price` (required)**

  `integer`, format: `int64`

* **`title` (required)**

  `string`

* **`hidden`**

  `boolean`, default: `true`

* **`id`**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

* **`instructorId`**

  `string`, format: `number` — User ID from Authentik (need to change subject mode to User's ID instead of hashed)

* **`introductionVideoKey`**

  `string`

* **`introductionVideoUrl`**

  `string`, format: `uri`

* **`originalCourseId`**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

* **`overview`**

  `string`

* **`status`**

  `string`, possible values: `"draft", "pending", "approved"`, default: `"draft"`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "id": "123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000",
  "originalCourseId": "123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000",
  "title": "Introduction to Programming",
  "price": 1000000,
  "hidden": true,
  "instructorId": "100",
  "status": "draft",
  "overview": "Learn practical Go backend concepts in this beginner-friendly course.",
  "introductionVideoUrl": "https://cdn.egolia.localhost/videos/course-intro.mp4",
  "introductionVideoKey": "videos/course-intro.mp4"
}
```

### course\_CourseAnalytics

- **Type:**`object`

* **`averageRating` (required)**

  `number`, format: `float`

* **`completedStudents` (required)**

  `integer`, format: `int32`

* **`completionRate` (required)**

  `number`, format: `float`

* **`courseId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

* **`enrolledStudents` (required)**

  `integer`, format: `int32`

* **`reviewCount` (required)**

  `integer`, format: `int32`

* **`totalRevenue` (required)**

  `integer`, format: `int64`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "courseId": "123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000",
  "totalRevenue": 12500000,
  "enrolledStudents": 125,
  "completedStudents": 84,
  "completionRate": 67.2,
  "averageRating": 4.7,
  "reviewCount": 42
}
```

### course\_Section

- **Type:**`object`

* **`id` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

* **`title` (required)**

  `string`

* **`originalSectionID`**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "id": "0de4f8f2-3440-4e29-9b88-9cfbbf4476fc",
  "title": "OOP Fundamentals",
  "originalSectionID": "0de4f8f2-3440-4e29-9b88-9cfbbf4476fc"
}
```

### course\_Lesson

- **Type:**`object`

* **`title` (required)**

  `string`

* **`id`**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

* **`originalLessonID`**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "id": "2926aa3f-29ad-449b-9556-c44d4fc676a0",
  "title": "Introduction to Python",
  "originalLessonID": "2926aa3f-29ad-449b-9556-c44d4fc676a0"
}
```

### course\_CourseDetailSectionItem

- **Type:**`object`

**All of:**

- **`id` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

- **`title` (required)**

  `string`

- **`originalSectionID`**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

* **`lessons` (required)**

  `array`

  **Items:**

  - **`title` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`id`**

    `string`, format: `uuid`

  - **`originalLessonID`**

    `string`, format: `uuid`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "id": "0de4f8f2-3440-4e29-9b88-9cfbbf4476fc",
  "title": "OOP Fundamentals",
  "originalSectionID": "0de4f8f2-3440-4e29-9b88-9cfbbf4476fc",
  "lessons": [
    {
      "id": "2926aa3f-29ad-449b-9556-c44d4fc676a0",
      "title": "Introduction to Python",
      "originalLessonID": "2926aa3f-29ad-449b-9556-c44d4fc676a0"
    }
  ]
}
```

### course\_CourseDetail

- **Type:**`object`

**All of:**

- **`price` (required)**

  `integer`, format: `int64`

- **`title` (required)**

  `string`

- **`hidden`**

  `boolean`, default: `true`

- **`id`**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

- **`instructorId`**

  `string`, format: `number` — User ID from Authentik (need to change subject mode to User's ID instead of hashed)

- **`introductionVideoKey`**

  `string`

- **`introductionVideoUrl`**

  `string`, format: `uri`

- **`originalCourseId`**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

- **`overview`**

  `string`

- **`status`**

  `string`, possible values: `"draft", "pending", "approved"`, default: `"draft"`

* **`sections` (required)**

  `array`

  **Items:**

  **All of:**

  - **`id` (required)**

    `string`, format: `uuid`

  - **`title` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`originalSectionID`**

    `string`, format: `uuid`

  * **`lessons` (required)**

    `array`

    **Items:**

    - **`title` (required)**

      `string`

    - **`id`**

      `string`, format: `uuid`

    - **`originalLessonID`**

      `string`, format: `uuid`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "id": "123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000",
  "originalCourseId": "123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000",
  "title": "Introduction to Programming",
  "price": 1000000,
  "hidden": true,
  "instructorId": "100",
  "status": null,
  "overview": "Learn practical Go backend concepts in this beginner-friendly course.",
  "introductionVideoUrl": "https://cdn.egolia.localhost/videos/course-intro.mp4",
  "introductionVideoKey": "videos/course-intro.mp4",
  "sections": [
    {
      "id": "0de4f8f2-3440-4e29-9b88-9cfbbf4476fc",
      "title": "OOP Fundamentals",
      "originalSectionID": "0de4f8f2-3440-4e29-9b88-9cfbbf4476fc",
      "lessons": [
        {
          "id": "2926aa3f-29ad-449b-9556-c44d4fc676a0",
          "title": "Introduction to Python",
          "originalLessonID": "2926aa3f-29ad-449b-9556-c44d4fc676a0"
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

### course\_CourseProgress

- **Type:**`object`

* **`completedLessons` (required)**

  `integer`, format: `int32`

* **`courseId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

* **`isCompleted` (required)**

  `boolean`

* **`progressPercent` (required)**

  `number`, format: `float`

* **`totalLessons` (required)**

  `integer`, format: `int32`

* **`userId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `number` — User ID from Authentik (need to change subject mode to User's ID instead of hashed)

**Example:**

```json
{
  "courseId": "123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000",
  "userId": "100",
  "totalLessons": 20,
  "completedLessons": 14,
  "progressPercent": 70,
  "isCompleted": false
}
```

### course\_Review

- **Type:**`object`

Represents a single review for a course.

- **`comment` (required)**

  `string`

- **`createdAt` (required)**

  `string`, format: `date-time`

- **`id` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

- **`rating` (required)**

  `integer`, format: `int`

- **`userId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `number` — User ID from Authentik (need to change subject mode to User's ID instead of hashed)

- **`courseId`**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "id": "8a9b1c2d-3e4f-5a6b-7c8d-9e0f1a2b3c4d",
  "courseId": "123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000",
  "userId": "100",
  "rating": 5,
  "comment": "Great course with practical examples.",
  "createdAt": "2026-04-15T14:30:00Z"
}
```

### course\_username

- **Type:**`string`

Username from Authentik

**Example:**

### course\_name

- **Type:**`[ "string", "null" ]`

Full name from Authentik

**Example:**

### course\_email

- **Type:**`[ "string", "null" ]`

Email from Authentik

**Example:**

### course\_CourseStudent

- **Type:**`object`

* **`completed` (required)**

  `boolean`

* **`email` (required)**

  `string | null`, format: `email` — Email from Authentik

* **`enrolledAt` (required)**

  `string`, format: `date-time`

* **`name` (required)**

  `string | null` — Full name from Authentik

* **`progressPercentage` (required)**

  `number`, format: `float`

* **`userId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `number` — User ID from Authentik (need to change subject mode to User's ID instead of hashed)

* **`username` (required)**

  `string` — Username from Authentik

**Example:**

```json
{
  "userId": "100",
  "username": "user",
  "name": "User",
  "email": "user@egolia.com",
  "enrolledAt": "2026-04-15T14:30:00Z",
  "progressPercentage": 72.5,
  "completed": false
}
```

- **Type:**`string`

**Example:**

### course\_Lesson\_properties-id

- **Type:**`string`

**Example:**

### course\_LessonComment

- **Type:**`object`

* **`content` (required)**

  `string`

* **`createdAt` (required)**

  `string`, format: `date-time`

* **`id` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

* **`lessonId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

* **`userId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `number` — User ID from Authentik (need to change subject mode to User's ID instead of hashed)

* **`parentCommentId`**

  `string | null`, format: `uuid`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "id": "1c948f26-c6db-4f20-b6ac-2d10164fb8c0",
  "userId": "100",
  "lessonId": "2926aa3f-29ad-449b-9556-c44d4fc676a0",
  "content": "This explanation of polymorphism is very clear.",
  "createdAt": "2026-03-22T10:30:00Z",
  "parentCommentId": "8fd4f406-583d-4cd5-9c24-23c490a06711"
}
```

### course\_LessonProgress

- **Type:**`object`

* **`id` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

* **`isCompleted` (required)**

  `boolean`

* **`lessonId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

* **`userId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `number` — User ID from Authentik (need to change subject mode to User's ID instead of hashed)

**Example:**

```json
{
  "id": "1e3a0a43-d6df-4f6d-a58d-60f0e5162f11",
  "userId": "100",
  "lessonId": "1e3a0a43-d6df-4f6d-a58d-60f0e5162f11",
  "isCompleted": true
}
```

### course\_TestAnswer

- **Type:**`object`

* **`content` (required)**

  `string`

* **`id` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

* **`isCorrect` (required)**

  `boolean`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "id": "4c413364-151d-44e4-a357-c0c5cf7c5f4a",
  "content": "Encapsulation hides implementation details behind a stable API.",
  "isCorrect": true
}
```

### course\_TestQuestion

- **Type:**`object`

* **`answers` (required)**

  `array`

  **Items:**

  - **`content` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`id` (required)**

    `string`, format: `uuid`

  - **`isCorrect` (required)**

    `boolean`

* **`id` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

* **`question` (required)**

  `string`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "id": "af2fb7f2-cf11-40d4-8628-b28f7d40f933",
  "question": "Which principle of OOP enables exposing only essential behavior?",
  "answers": [
    {
      "id": "4c413364-151d-44e4-a357-c0c5cf7c5f4a",
      "content": "Encapsulation hides implementation details behind a stable API.",
      "isCorrect": true
    }
  ]
}
```

### billing\_Error

- **Type:**`object`

* **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

* **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

* **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

### billing\_RevenueAnalytics

- **Type:**`object`

* **`completedTransactions` (required)**

  `integer`

* **`failedTransactions` (required)**

  `integer`

* **`from` (required)**

  `string`, format: `date-time`

* **`to` (required)**

  `string`, format: `date-time`

* **`totalRevenue` (required)**

  `integer`, format: `int64`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "from": "2026-03-22T10:30:00Z",
  "to": "2026-03-22T10:30:00Z",
  "totalRevenue": 152000000,
  "completedTransactions": 421,
  "failedTransactions": 9
}
```

### billing\_id

- **Type:**`string`

User ID from Authentik (need to change subject mode to User's ID instead of hashed)

**Example:**

### billing\_TransactionStatus

- **Type:**`string`

Current status of a billing transaction

**Example:**

### billing\_Transaction

- **Type:**`object`

* **`amount` (required)**

  `integer`, format: `int64`

* **`courseId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

* **`createdAt` (required)**

  `string`, format: `date-time`

* **`id` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

* **`status` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"pending", "completed", "failed"` — Current status of a billing transaction

* **`updatedAt` (required)**

  `string`, format: `date-time`

* **`userId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `number` — User ID from Authentik (need to change subject mode to User's ID instead of hashed)

**Example:**

```json
{
  "id": "4c7c8f0a-4f6e-4da1-867d-38f1120f0e5d",
  "userId": "100",
  "courseId": "0f4f19b1-1602-4c12-ac1a-9ad5baf1e4dc",
  "amount": 499000,
  "status": "completed",
  "createdAt": "2026-03-25T08:30:00Z",
  "updatedAt": "2026-03-25T08:30:00Z"
}
```

### billing\_Pagination

- **Type:**`object`

* **`hasNext` (required)**

  `boolean` — Whether there is a next page

* **`hasPrev` (required)**

  `boolean` — Whether there is a previous page

* **`limit` (required)**

  `integer` — Number of items per page

* **`page` (required)**

  `integer` — Current page number

* **`total` (required)**

  `integer` — Total number of items

* **`totalPages` (required)**

  `integer` — Total number of pages

**Example:**

```json
{
  "page": 1,
  "limit": 20,
  "total": 100,
  "totalPages": 5,
  "hasNext": true,
  "hasPrev": false
}
```

### blog\_id

- **Type:**`string`

User ID from Authentik (need to change subject mode to User's ID instead of hashed)

**Example:**

### blog\_Post

- **Type:**`object`

* **`authorId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `number` — User ID from Authentik (need to change subject mode to User's ID instead of hashed)

* **`commentCount` (required)**

  `integer`

* **`content` (required)**

  `string`

* **`createdAt` (required)**

  `string`, format: `date-time`

* **`id` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

* **`tags` (required)**

  `array`

  **Items:**

  `string`

* **`title` (required)**

  `string`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "id": "74af02ce-4e69-4ca1-a721-c0e19c9937b8",
  "authorId": "100",
  "title": "Cach toi toi uu hanh trinh hoc tap",
  "content": "Day la noi dung bai viet chia se kinh nghiem hoc tap tren Egolia.",
  "tags": [
    "learning",
    "productivity"
  ],
  "createdAt": "2026-03-25T08:00:00Z",
  "commentCount": 12
}
```

### blog\_Pagination

- **Type:**`object`

* **`hasNext` (required)**

  `boolean` — Whether there is a next page

* **`hasPrev` (required)**

  `boolean` — Whether there is a previous page

* **`limit` (required)**

  `integer` — Number of items per page

* **`page` (required)**

  `integer` — Current page number

* **`total` (required)**

  `integer` — Total number of items

* **`totalPages` (required)**

  `integer` — Total number of pages

**Example:**

```json
{
  "page": 1,
  "limit": 20,
  "total": 100,
  "totalPages": 5,
  "hasNext": true,
  "hasPrev": false
}
```

### blog\_Error

- **Type:**`object`

* **`code` (required)**

  `string` — Error code

* **`message` (required)**

  `string` — Human-readable error message

* **`more_info`**

  `string` — URL with more information about the error

**Example:**

```json
{
  "code": "EXAMPLE_CODE",
  "message": "Example error",
  "more_info": "https://api.egolia.com/docs/errors/EXAMPLE_CODE"
}
```

### blog\_Comment

- **Type:**`object`

* **`authorId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `number` — User ID from Authentik (need to change subject mode to User's ID instead of hashed)

* **`content` (required)**

  `string`

* **`createdAt` (required)**

  `string`, format: `date-time`

* **`id` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

* **`parentCommentId` (required)**

  `string | null`, format: `uuid`

* **`postId` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uuid`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "id": "834897ce-45e7-43a5-92b2-4ec1f0dc3cd1",
  "postId": "74af02ce-4e69-4ca1-a721-c0e19c9937b8",
  "authorId": "100",
  "content": "Bai viet nay rat huu ich.",
  "parentCommentId": null,
  "createdAt": "2026-03-25T09:00:00Z"
}
```
